purpose: Minimal executable bounded machine-facing facade for read/query and proposal-submission continuity

runtime.write_behavior: proposal-only write lane; canonical write/apply out of scope

operations.name: get_object_by_id
operations.notes: Executable in this slice; resolves one bounded object under allowed knowledge classes.

operations.name: list_objects
operations.notes: Executable in this slice; bounded object discovery with class and limit controls.

operations.name: submit_proposal
operations.notes: Executable in this slice via bounded POST /v1/submit_proposal and deterministic proposal artifact write under proposals/submitted; canonical apply remains deferred.

non_goals: Unbounded filesystem or canonical write access
